retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional and does not fail; retry would cause a use-after-free double-put.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases the reference on the fallback skcipher transformation stored in the context. Called during cra_exit to clean up resources allocated in cra_init. After this call, the fallback tfm may be freed; the caller must not use the algorithm instance any further. No return value; the operation always succeeds and the reference is unconditionally dropped.
